title: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break Including the Asuka Bardiel face thing
display_title: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break Including the Asuka Bardiel face thing
wikitext:
[]: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Jan 23, 2018 11:22 am This would've been so much more awesome if it had been used in the film. New Theatrical is missing that uncomfortable, overly detailed violence that Neon Genesis had, plus, it would've made more sense when Shinji's white exterior melted when his soul entered Zeruel's core to save Rei. This seems like it would be sort of the same thing, but more disturbing, seeing as how Asuka sees her own face contorting and freaking out, and pulls it back on. God this would've been cool to see.

[]: Re: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by Blockio » Wed Jan 24, 2018 2:38 pm Do you by any chance have a link to those storyboards? I am really curious after reading this

[]: Re: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by Literary Eagle » Thu Jan 25, 2018 11:08 pm You can find part of the storyboard for that scene in my review of the Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Complete Records Collection , here: http://literaryeagle.tumblr.com/post/157420800499/for-my-fifty-fifth-evangelion-book-review-here-is It's a long post, so if you don't want to read the whole review, you can just skip ahead to the part that says "This book also includes some storyboards for scenes that didn’t make it into the movie, such as this scary encounter between Asuka and the Angel that infected Evangelion Unit-03".

[]: Re: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Jan 26, 2018 12:32 pm Literary Eagle wrote: You can find part of the storyboard for that scene in my review of the Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance Complete Records Collection , here: http://literaryeagle.tumblr.com/post/157420800499/for-my-fifty-fifth-evangelion-book-review-here-is It's a long post, so if you don't want to read the whole review, you can just skip ahead to the part that says "This book also includes some storyboards for scenes that didn’t make it into the movie, such as this scary encounter between Asuka and the Angel that infected Evangelion Unit-03".

[]: Re: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by ShonHam » Mon Aug 13, 2018 9:49 am It's really visceral looking, I really enjoy that style too. Even to see a rough animatic of sorts developed of those alternate cuts/scenes would have been amazing.

[]: Re: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Aug 14, 2018 9:39 am Some additional information on storyboard material that was scrapped, linked from the stickied 2.0 CRC thread. post/439425/Eva-2XX-Storyboards-vs-Final/ This thread itself can probably be merged with a previous one that discusses the "Great Asuka Rip-Off" but I'm not doing that right now.

Article: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break Including the Asuka Bardiel face thing
[]: Just discovered the rejected storyboards for Break. Including the Asuka-Bardiel face thing.             Quote Post by AdamMalkovitch » Tue Jan 23, 2018 11:22 am This would've been so much more awesome if it had been used in the film. New Theatrical is missing that uncomfortable, overly detailed violence that Neon Genesis had, plus, it would've made more sense when Shinji's white exterior melted when his soul entered Zeruel's core to save Rei. This seems like it would be sort of the same thing, but more disturbing, seeing as how Asuka sees her own face contorting and freaking out, and pulls it back on. God this would've been cool to see.
